edges.evidence_quote: The triads originated from secret societies formed in the 18th and 19th centuries, some influenced by white lotus societies of the 14th century
edges.context: Triads were influenced by White Lotus societies.

edges.evidence_quote: Notable organisations included the Green Gang, another Hung Society splinter which participated in the Shanghai massacre of Chinese Communist Party (CCP) members in 1927.
edges.context: Green Gang is a splinter of Hung Society, which is related to triads.

edges.evidence_quote: The Tiandihui, the Heaven and Earth Society, also called Hongmen (the Vast Family), is a Chinese fraternal organisation and historically a secretive folk religious sect in the vein of the Ming loyalist White Lotus Sect, the Tiandihui's ancestral organisation.
edges.context: Triads are branches of the Tiandihui.

edges.evidence_quote: There were four main groups of triads—the Chiu Chow Group (including Sun Yee On), 14K, the Wo Group (including Wo Shing Wo), and the Sze Tai (Luen Group, Tan Yee, Macau Chai, Tung Group), the Big Four in Chinese—operating in Hong Kong.
edges.context: Sun Yee On is a subgroup of the Chiu Chow Group, which is one of the four main triad groups.

edges.evidence_quote: There were four main groups of triads—the Chiu Chow Group (including Sun Yee On), 14K, the Wo Group (including Wo Shing Wo), and the Sze Tai (Luen Group, Tan Yee, Macau Chai, Tung Group), the Big Four in Chinese—operating in Hong Kong.
edges.context: 14K is one of the four main triad groups in Hong Kong.

edges.evidence_quote: There were four main groups of triads—the Chiu Chow Group (including Sun Yee On), 14K, the Wo Group (including Wo Shing Wo), and the Sze Tai (Luen Group, Tan Yee, Macau Chai, Tung Group), the Big Four in Chinese—operating in Hong Kong.
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo is part of the Wo Group, one of the four main triad groups.

edges.evidence_quote: The most important triads active in the international heroin trade are the 14K and the Big Circle Gang.
edges.context: Big Circle Gang is a triad active in heroin trade.

edges.evidence_quote: According to the expert in terrorist organisations and mafia-type organised crime, Antonio De Bonis, there is a close relationship between the Triads and the Camorra, and the port of Naples is the most important landing point of the trades managed by the Chinese in cooperation with the Camorra.
edges.context: Triads and Camorra cooperate in human trafficking, drug trafficking, and money laundering.

edges.evidence_quote: The most powerful triads based in Hong Kong are: - 14K : 14K Yee 14K Hau 14K Yan 14K Yung 14K Ngai 14K Chung 14K Mui 14K Tak
edges.context: 14K is listed as one of the most powerful triads based in Hong Kong.

edges.evidence_quote: The most powerful triads based in Hong Kong are: - Chiu Chow Group : Sun Yee On King Yee Fuk Yee Hing Yee Kwan
edges.context: Sun Yee On is listed as one of the most powerful triads based in Hong Kong.

edges.evidence_quote: The most powerful triads based in Hong Kong are: - Wo Group : Wo Hop To Wo Shing Wo Wo On Lok Wo Yung Yee Wo Kwan Ying Wo Li Wo Wo Shing Tong Wo Hung Shing Wo Kwan Lok Wo Yee Tong Wo Shing Yee Wo Yat Ping Wo Yee Ping
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo is listed as part of the Wo Group, one of the most powerful triads based in Hong Kong.

edges.evidence_quote: In Australia, the major importer of illicit drugs in recent decades has been 'The Company', according to police sources in the region. This is a conglomerate run by triad bosses which focuses particularly on methamphetamine and cocaine.
edges.context: The Company is a conglomerate run by triad bosses, indicating it is part of or controlled by triads.

edges.evidence_quote: The 14K, Sun Yee On triads were believed to have been closely affiliated with Cheng and used as enforcers for the collection of gambling debts, in addition to being engaged in prostitution, human, and drug trafficking.
edges.context: 14K and Sun Yee On are both believed to have been closely affiliated with Cheng and used as enforcers.

edges.evidence_quote: South African authorities have identified four major Chinese gangs connected to the Triad operating in South Africa: the Wo Shing Wo group, the San Yee On group, the 14K-Hau group, and the 14K-Ngai group.
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo and San Yee On are both identified as major Chinese gangs connected to the Triad operating in South Africa.

edges.evidence_quote: South African authorities have identified four major Chinese gangs connected to the Triad operating in South Africa: the Wo Shing Wo group, the San Yee On group, the 14K-Hau group, and the 14K-Ngai group.
edges.context: Wo Shing Wo and 14K are both identified as major Chinese gangs connected to the Triad operating in South Africa.

edges.evidence_quote: South African authorities have identified four major Chinese gangs connected to the Triad operating in South Africa: the Wo Shing Wo group, the San Yee On group, the 14K-Hau group, and the 14K-Ngai group.

edges.context: Big Circle Gang is a triad group or related to triads.

edges.evidence_quote: Leung Kwok-chung, aka "Tattooed Chung" (high-ranking leader of the Tai Kok Tsui branch of Wo Shing Wo and the mastermind behind the murder of Lee Tai-lung, the dragon head of Tsim Sha Tsui branch of Sun Yee On ).
edges.context: A Wo Shing Wo leader masterminded the murder of a Sun Yee On leader.
